headline: AI Chips Update - NVIDIA and Wowza Tackle Synthetic Video Threats Globally
summary: Wowza has announced the deployment of a groundbreaking synthetic video detection solution integrated with NVIDIA's Synthetic Video Detector (SVD). This integration provides real-time AI-generated video detection capabilities across more than 35,000 of Wowza's video deployments globally, utilizing existing NVIDIA infrastructure. As synthetic video poses increasing threats in media, government, public safety, and financial sectors, NVIDIA's SVD offers a solution that can identify AI-engineered...
